title: Tendons vs Ligaments
script_summary: Exploring the distinct roles of tendons and ligaments in the human body.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about tendons vs ligaments.
Tendons connect muscles to bones, while ligaments connect bones to bones.
Think of tendons as the body's pullers, and ligaments as stabilizers.
Studies show tendons can withstand a lot of tension, while ligaments provide flexibility.
But did you know some injuries can affect both tendons and ligaments?
Understanding this helps in recovery and injury prevention!
Like and follow for more science insights!
